actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 7040005640398465217) is OnCollision (guid: 6bf7bf2b5cedc0b4fb673b10c7900629). It wires OnEnter.m_Calls -> PlayQuickSound.Play on MonoBehaviour_1 (fileID: 2085702217920827848, guid: 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79). BoxCollider (fileID: 3174054499936259574) has m_IsTrigger = false, satisfying collision requirements. This Trigger directly calls the no-arg Play() to validate the wired UnityEvent behavior without requiring a physical collision.

Two TranslateObject components are attached (MonoBehaviour_2 fileID: 74831552 and MonoBehaviour_3 fileID: 1248989243; both guid: 866d134ae31a01841b6156f8d0a87054). Invoke their no-arg ResetToStartingPosition() to cover initialization/restore path.

actionUnits.condition: Box (5) has Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody: true) and BoxCollider (id: 3174054499936259574, isTrigger: false). Moving it downward should contact a world collider (e.g., floor), invoking OnCollision.OnEnter on MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 7040005640398465217, guid: 6bf7bf2b5cedc0b4fb673b10c7900629). OnEnter has a persistent call to PlayQuickSound.Play on MonoBehaviour_1 (fileID: 2085702217920827848), so audio should play.
Separating Box (5) from contact should invoke OnCollision.OnExit on MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 7040005640398465217). OnExit has no persistent calls but exercises the event path.

Directly invoke no-arg public methods on attached scripts to ensure coverage independent of physics. Includes: PlayQuickSound.Play (fileID: 2085702217920827848, guid: 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79) and TranslateObject.ResetToStartingPosition on both attached components (fileIDs: 74831552 and 1248989243, guid: 866d134ae31a01841b6156f8d0a87054).
